required_evidence: Denominator policy signed off for source, matched, and prediction-coverable events; regenerated leaderboard rows expose all denominator fields.
Advisor-approved main horizon choice or documented demotion to feasibility-negative analysis; regenerated horizon triage for chosen horizons.
Ready track matrix covering required splits, tasks, and modality tracks; count summary matching documented expected counts.
Source-review decision for each source-review-required horizon and evidence that chosen main horizons no longer depend on unresolved event gaps.
Paper-table or appendix plan preserving non-ready tracks as explicit negative readiness findings.
